nasb.text: To the degree that she glorified herself and lived sensuously, to the same degree give her torment and mourning; for she says in her heart, ‘I sit  as  a queen and I am not a widow, and will never see mourning.’

esv.text: As she glorified herself and lived in luxury, so give her a like measure of torment and mourning, since in her heart she says, ‘I sit as a queen, I am no widow, and mourning I shall never see.’

cnv.text: 她怎樣炫耀自己，怎樣奢華揮霍， 你們也要怎樣給她痛苦悲哀。 因為她心裡常常說： ‘我坐著作女王， 我不是寡婦， 決不會看見悲哀。’

ccb.text: 她过去怎样自炫自耀、 奢华荒淫， 现在也要让她怎样痛苦哀伤。 因为她心里说， ‘我贵为女王，不是寡妇， 绝不会经历哀伤。’

csbs.text: 她怎样炫耀自己、骄奢淫逸， 你们也要照样给她折磨和悲伤， 因为她心里说：‘我坐着女王的位子， 我不是寡妇，绝不会经历悲伤。’
